title: Tamil Nadu election results 2026 LIVE: TVK leads in over 100 seats as CM Stalin, other DMK veterans trail
content: TVK president Vijay continues to lead in Tiruchi East and Perambur; Chief Minister M.K. Stalin trails in Kolathur; DMK's Dhravidamani wins in Gudalur

title: Puducherry election results 2026 LIVE: Ruling AINRC leads the race; CM Rangasamy secures comfortable majority in Thattanchavady
content: P.R.N. Thirumurugan, Minister for Civil Supplies and Consumer Affairs in the Puducherry government, retained the Karaikal North Assembly constituency for a fourth consecutive term

title: Kerala Election Results 2026 LIVE: UDF set for massive win; Chandy Oommen retains Puthuppally
content: KPCC president Sunny Joseph says the emerging verdict is a clear rejection of the CPI(M)-led LDF government's "anti-people policies"

title: Assam election results LIVE: Trends show NDA inching towards majority mark
content: Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma leads in Jalukbari while State Congress president Gaurav Gogoi trails behind his BJP rival Hitendranath Goswami in Jorhat

title: Karnataka bypolls results 2026: Congress retains Bagalkot constituency, leads in Davanagere South
content: Umesh Meti won Bagalkot Assembly constituency in Karnataka by a margin of 22,332 votes, the Election Commission said

title: Tamil Nadu election results: TVK frontline leaders put up strong performances in early trends
content: Mr. Vijay, who contested from two seats – Perambur in Chennai and Tiruchi East – is leading in both seats by a comfortable margin

title: Kerala Assembly results 2026: UDF all set to clean sweep in Ernakulam
content: The Left Democratic Front, which had won five seats in the 2021 elections, has failed to make an impact this time

title: West Bengal election results LIVE: BJP inches to 200-mark in leads; TMC alleges ECI delay in uploading of data
content: Counting of votes for the high-stakes Assembly elections is under way, with the verdict set to decide whether the Mamata Banerjee-led TMC returns to power for a fourth consecutive term or the BJP scripts history by forming its first government in the State

title: Supreme Court seeks report from Karnataka govt on actor Darshan's plea alleging lack of basic amenities in prison
content: Senior advocate Mukul Rohatgi, appearing for Mr. Darshan, submitted that the actor is being denied the basic amenities because the court had made an observation that no five-star treatment should be given to him in jail

title: Kerala election result: Neck-and-neck fight in Mananthavady; Congress surges in Kalpetta, Sulthan Bathery
content: By the end of the 10th round of counting, Usha Vijayan has once again moved ahead, leading by a margin of 1,072 votes

title: Assembly polls results: ‘INDI alliance’ has no future, says BJP
content: The party also hit out at Congress leader Rahul Gandhi, saying he has failed to effectively steer the alliance and is again absent on the counting day

title: TVK and the dynamics of disruption
content: As trends continue to emerge, it is clear that Tamil Nadu is heading in a path it has never taken so far — whether it is a majority for the TVK, a non-Dravidian party, or a hung Assembly

title: SC asks Lok Sabha MP to approach Patna HC with request to list his pending petition
content: Yadav, a sitting MP from Bihar's Purnia constituency, has sought upgradation of his security cover citing alleged threats from gangster Lawrance Bishnoi's gang

title: Tamil Nadu election results: TVK chief Vijay’s father S.A. Chandrasekhar hails party’s lead
content: The TVK’s victory, without having an alliance, shows Mr. Vijay’s brave attempt, Mr. Chandrasekhar told a news agency

title: Tamil Nadu election results: CM Stalin trails in Kolathur as TVK leads in Chennai region
content: Only Deputy Chief Minister Udhayanidhi Stalin and HR&CE Minister P.K. Sekarbabu were leading out of the 16 constituencies as of 1 p.m.

title: Assam Assembly election results 2026: BJP leads in around 79 seats; key candidates status
content: The BJP is aiming for a third consecutive term in Assam, while the Congress is attempting a comeback after a decade out of power

title: Six Telangana districts record temperatures above 45°C as heat intensifies
content: According to data from Telangana Development Planning Society (TGDPS), Balkonda in Nizamabad was the hottest location in the State touching 45.8℃

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Women make up over 80% of the additional voters
content: Of about 25.3 lakh more votes polled this time than in 2021, around 20.8 lakh came from women, the highest in the last four Assembly elections

title: West Bengal elections 2026: How have the turncoats fared?
content: Of the seven TMC leaders who joined BJP in the past two years, only two were fielded by the saffron party

title: Electoral debuts in Tamil Nadu’s past Assembly elections tell a mixed story of breakthroughs, missed chances
content: With the high profile debut of actor-politician C. Joseph Vijay’s Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam in the latest polls, expectations are high about whether the party can breach the Dravidian duopoly or merely dent its margins

title: Suvendu Adhikari edges ahead in Nandigram; Mamata Banerjee leads in Bhabanipur
content: The latest round of counting by ECI has indicated Banerjee leading from Bhabanipur seat by over 13,000 votes, while Adhikari is ahead by over 8,000 votes in Nandigram

title: A peek into the secret lives of Coorg’s many frogs
content: A film by Roundglass Sustain captures ecologist Dr Vishnupriya Sankararaman's journey through the plantations of Coorg, where she has documented around 36 species of frogs

title: Kerala election results 2026: RMP leader says CM Pinarayi Vijayan’s ‘struggle’ in Dharmadam sends political message
content: In an apparent reference to the CM, she said the person who had allegedly branded others as “traitors” and called for their elimination was now “standing exposed in the scorching sun”

title: TDP Mahanadu 2026 in Nellore from May 27 to 29; Bhoomi Puja at IKSEZ on May 6
content: Three-day annual conclave of the ruling party to be held at IFFCO Kisan Special Economic Zone in Kodavaluru mandal from May 27 to 29; Bhoomi Puja on Wednesday

title: NDA’s victory reflected growing confidence in Modi’s leadership: CM Naidu
content: “The journey towards Viksit Bharat gained further strength with this outcome. The people’s trust and support for NDA’s steadfast commitment to development is clearly evident,” CM Naidu said

title: BJP’s Harshad Parmar wins in Umreth assembly bypoll in Gujarat
content: BJP candidate Harshadbhai Parmar received 85,500 votes compared to 54,757 votes polled for Congress candidate Bhrugurajsinh Chauhan, as per the website

title: IUML credits UDF’s teamwork for Assembly polls victory in Kerala
content: The Indian Union Muslim League (IUML) is leading in 23 of the 27 seats it contested in the Assembly polls

title: AAP woman leader accuses supporters of BJP MLA Byrathi Basavaraj of vandalising her car, complains to Bengaluru Police Commissioner
content: AAP’s Vignan Nagar ward president Sathyavani lodged a complaint with the Bengaluru Police Commissioner accusing local BJP leaders of vandalising her car parked outside her residence

title: SC flags ‘risk’ of misuse in transgender self-identification debate
content: A Bench headed by Chief Justice of India Surya Kant said the question of staying the Act did not arise as the law has not yet been notified

title: Kerala election result: Verdict against LDF's ‘anti-people policies’, says Congress as UDF heads for big win
content: Addressing mediapersons at the party headquarters in Thiruvananthapuram, KPCC president Sunny Joseph said the emerging verdict was a clear rejection of the CPI(M)-led LDF government's "anti-people policies”

title: West Bengal Assembly results: Mamata Banerjee urges TMC nominees not to leave counting centres as ECI data shows BJP leading
content: In a video message issued in the midst of the counting of votes, Ms. Banerjee urged party workers to remain vigilant and not to lose morale

title: Political executive will decide on Bengal law and order, says SC
content: SC was replying to an oral mentioning to continue deployment of central forces to deter post-poll violence in West Bengal

title: Koridang bypoll results: BJP’s Daochier I. Imchen wins by 3,123 votes
content: The bypoll, necessitated by the demise of sitting BJP MLA Imkong L. Imchen in November last year, witnessed a strong voter turnout of 82.21% on April 9

title: Actor Trisha visits Tirumala temple on eve of 43rd birthday
content: Actor offers prayers at Sri Venkateswara Swamy temple on the eve of her 43rd birthday; visit adds to a string of celebrity pilgrimages to Tirumala in recent weeks

title: SC slams ‘nasty’ Registry for not issuing notice to ED, says officials think they are ‘super CJI’
content: The CJI referred to an order passed on March 23 on the plea, and wondered how the registry officials construed that the Bench did not issue notice to the Enforcement Directorate and other respondents on the plea

title: Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi Adityanath asks DMs to remain alert amid heavy rain warning from IMD
content: Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi Adityanath instructed the District Magistrates to ensure that relief reaches affected citizens immediately and that the impact of adverse weather is minimised

title: Supreme Court seeks Centre’s response on plea seeking filling of vacancies in Armed Forces Tribunal
content: A Bench of Chief Justice of India Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi posted the matter for hearing after two weeks

title: YSRCP slams Naidu over ₹20,439-per-sq.ft. spend on Secretariat, CMO buildings
content: Government spending a whopping ₹20,439 per sq.ft. for the Secretariat and CMO buildings in Amaravati, says Kakani Govardhan Reddy

title: Operation Sindoor showed world Indian military's capabilities: Rajnath Singh
content: Addressing an event in Uttar Pradesh's Prayagraj, Rajnath Singh emphasised that while the armed forces "showed patience", they were clinical in destroying terrorist infrastructure

title: Kerala election results 2026: KPCC headquarters erupts in joy as UDF leads
content: As the counting entered the third round, the mood at the Congress headquarters turned jubilant, with party workers kickstarting celebrations by distributing sweets

title: West Bengal Assembly elections 2026 results: No victory rallies will be allowed after announcement of results, says CEO Manoj Agarwal
content: “There has been no incident of violence. Any poll-related death was reported from anywhere in Bengal,” Mr. Agarwal said

title: West Bengal polls: Situation ‘fishy’, say cautious TMC leaders as several candidates trail
content: The trend triggered concern among TMC supporters, prompting party leaders to exercise caution in making claims of a landslide victory

title: Assam election results 2026: Major Opposition leaders trailing in early trends
content: Congress leader Saikia was trailing by 4,967 votes in Sivasagar district's Nazira seat. BJP’s Mayur Borgohain secured 11,607 votes after the second round, compared to Saikia’s 6,640

title: Kerala Assembly elections 2026 results: Pinarayi Vijayan trails in Dharmadam after two rounds; UDF takes early lead
content: UDF candidate V.P. Abdul Rasheed surged ahead with a lead of 2,523 votes after nearly two hours of counting, overturning the LDF’s initial advantage in the constituency

title: Kerala election results 2026: UDF leads in all three constituencies in Wayanad; Minister O.R. Kelu trails in Mananthavady
content: In the Mananthavady segment, CPI(M) candidate O.R. Kelu, a Minister in the present Cabinet, is trailing by 744 votes against his nearest rival, Usha Vijayan of the Congress.

title: Kerala election results 2026: UDF leads in all five constituencies in Idukki
content: In the third round of counting for the Idukki constituency, UDF candidate Roy K. Paulose has established a lead of 4,063 votes over LDF candidate and Water Resources Minister Roshy Augustine

title: Space Wrap: From Sriharikota to Leh, preparations for Gaganyaan mission in full swing
content: This article is part of Space Wrap, a round-up of space news and developments in and related to India every month

title: Watch: What happens on counting day? | Explained
content:
Voting is over. Across Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Puducherry, West Bengal and Assam, the big question now is: who wins? 
With counting of votes set to begin on May 4, here’s a closer look at how the process is done in India — step by step.

title: Assembly election results 2026: Top 10 winners and losers
content: The 2026 assembly elections have dramatically reshaped India's political landscape. Vijay's debut in Tamil Nadu, the BJP's gains in West Bengal and Kerala's return to rotation mark significant shifts. Established powers face challenges as new forces emerge, redefining narratives and pushing others to the margins. This analysis highlights the key winners and losers.

title: 'No need to be afraid': Mamata to TMC counting agents; assures 'win after sunset'
content: Directing the party candidates and counting agents not to leave the couting centre, Mamata said her party would win after the sunset and that there is "no need for anyone to be afraid". Mamata, who is seeking the fourth strait term, alleged a foul play by the Election Commission, and claimed that there's a BJP's ​plan to show themselves ahead first.

title: RG Kar victim’s mother, BJP candidate Ratna Debnath leads from Panihati
content: In a closely watched West Bengal election, RG Kar rape victim’s mother and BJP candidate Ratna Debnath is currently leading in Panihati.  She is campaigning on women's safety and her daughter's memory against TMC's Tirthankar Ghosh.  Nationally, BJP leads on 121 seats, TMC on 71, with high voter turnout recorded.

title: As many say software is dead, Amazon Web Services CEO calls it a 'huge business opportunity’
content: AWS CEO Matt Garman views the AI-driven 'SaaSpocalypse' as a major business opportunity, not a threat.  He highlighted the rise of agentic AI reshaping work and announced new AI-powered tools like the Quick desktop app, aiming to revolutionize personal productivity.  AWS is also deepening its OpenAI partnership, integrating advanced AI models into its cloud services to meet surging demand.

title: PSL: Babar Azam's Rohit Sharma-inspired 'walk' celebration goes wrong
content: Babar Azam captained Peshawar Zalmi to their second PSL title, defeating Hyderabad Kingsmen by five wickets. A light-hearted attempt to recreate Rohit Sharma's iconic walk during celebrations became a viral meme. All-rounder Aaron Hardie was the star, excelling with both bat and ball in the final.

title: 'They cheated people': Humayun Kabir congratulates West Bengal for defeating TMC
content: West Bengal's assembly election results reveal widespread public anger against the Trinamool Congress, according to AUJP founder Humayun Kabir. He accused the ruling party of extensive corruption, surpassing even British-era exploitation.  Kabir, a former TMC leader, expressed confidence in winning his seats, as early trends indicated a significant shift in power.

title: ‘Watching Virat, you understand the art of batting’: RCB star on Kohli’s impact
content: Jacob Bethell is making the most of his IPL 2026 opportunity with Royal Challengers Bengaluru. He is learning from Virat Kohli and other senior players. Bethell's role has increased due to Phil Salt's absence. He is adapting to the high tempo of the league. Bethell's development could be crucial for RCB's playoff push.

title: West Bengal Assembly Election Results 2026: The colour changes, the argument remains
content: The BJP, which had won 77 seats and 38.15% vote share in 2021, is now showing a dramatic surge in counting trends. By noon, several live trackers had the BJP crossing or approaching the halfway mark, with leads in the 140–150 range and vote share estimates hovering around 46–48%, while the TMC trailed significantly behind.

title: Bengal results: BJP makes gains in TMC strongholds, including Muslim belts; leads in over 80 seats
content: Early West Bengal election results indicate the Bharatiya Janata Party is making significant inroads in Muslim-majority constituencies.  This suggests a shift in voter allegiance.  The Trinamool Congress faces challenges converting votes despite secularism campaigns.  Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee urges party workers to remain steadfast, asserting the TMC is still ahead.  High voter turnout was recorded across phases.

title: IPL 2026: Phil Salt returns home mid-season for scans, RCB face anxious wait
content: England opener Phil Salt has returned home for scans on a finger injury sustained during an IPL 2026 match, casting doubt on his immediate availability for Royal Challengers Bengaluru. Salt, who had been in impressive form, is hopeful of a swift recovery and a return later this month as RCB push for the playoffs.

title: Vijay for beginners: The cinema star who could become Tamil Nadu's 'Thalapathy'
content: And today, one of the starkest outliers in the early trends is the performance of Vijay’s TVK. But who is Vijay, who, if trends hold, could become the new Thalapathy of Tamil Nadu politics?

title: GT IPL 2026 playoff scenarios: Gujarat Titans back in the mix with 3 straight wins
content: Gujarat Titans secured a thrilling four-wicket victory over Punjab Kings, marking their third consecutive win and reigniting playoff hopes. Sai Sudharsan's steady fifty and Washington Sundar's crucial late hitting guided them home. Despite the wins, a negative Net Run Rate and tough upcoming fixtures mean Gujarat must secure at least two more victories to guarantee qualification.

title: Will Rohit Sharma play today for Mumbai Indians vs LSG?
content: Mumbai Indians and Lucknow Super Giants, both struggling at the bottom of the IPL 2026 table, face off at Wankhede Stadium. With playoff hopes fading, both teams are desperate for a win. Mumbai's campaign has been hampered by inconsistent performances and the uncertain availability of Rohit Sharma due to injury.

title: IPL 2026: From Abhishek to Riyan Parag — full list of Code of Conduct violations
content: IPL 2026 is witnessing a surge in disciplinary actions alongside thrilling cricket. Eight players and staff have faced penalties, from fines to demerit points, for offenses like audible obscenities, mobile phone use in the dugout, and aggressive send-offs. Captains are also being fined for slow over-rates, highlighting a growing concern over player conduct.

title: ‘You are a magician’: SRK’s emotional tribute to Narine after historic milestone
content: Shah Rukh Khan celebrated Sunil Narine's historic 200th IPL wicket, a milestone achieved exclusively for the Kolkata Knight Riders. Narine, the first player to reach this mark for a single franchise, also became the leading overseas bowler in the 200-wicket club. His exceptional consistency and crucial role in KKR's success were highlighted.

title: Mamata Banerjee vs Suvendu Adhikari: All eyes on high-stakes battle in Bhowanipore
content: West Bengal's high-stakes political battle intensifies as Mamata Banerjee and Suvendu Adhikari face off in Bhabanipur.  While Banerjee has a strong history in the constituency, a significant number of Muslim voters are under scrutiny, potentially impacting the TMC's victory margin.

title: ‘Teenon me khelunga’: Babar Azam shuts down format debate after PSL win - Watch
content: Babar Azam captained Peshawar Zalmi to the PSL 2026 title, defeating Hyderabad Kingsmen by five wickets. Azam emphatically declared his commitment to playing all three formats, silencing T20 relevance debates. He was the tournament's leading scorer with 588 runs. Aaron Hardie shone in the final with a stellar all-round performance, securing the victory for Zalmi.

title: Election Results Live Updates: Bengal Chooses BJP, Vijay Delivers Tamil Nadu Blockbuster, Congress Comeback In Kerala
content: Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: Exit polls predict a close competition between Trinamool Congress and BJP in West Bengal

title: Markets Rally On Election Results Amid Global Oil Risk Pressure
content: The Sensex and Nifty benchmarks moved up sharply. Both indices jumped as domestic political signals boosted confidence. Markets were helped by optimism around policy continuity and stability.

title: Tamil Nadu Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: DMK Wins 1 Seat, Vijay's TVK Leading In Over 100
content: Tamil Nadu Assembly Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: While most exit polls have predicted DMK's second straight win, one suggested a huge wave of the "Vijay effect" in the state this time.

title: "They'll First Show Their Results": Mamata Banerjee Alleges BJP Has A Plan
content: The BJP is leading in 190 seats, followed by the Trinamool Congress in 99 seats. The Bengal assembly has 294 seats

title: "He Never Had 1% Of Doubt": Vijay's Father On TVK's Landmark Win
content: Before the counting got under way, the Vijay and his father visited the Subramanyaswamy Temple in Tiruttani to offer prayers.

title: "They Were Laughing At Us For Predicting Vijay's Victory": Axis My India Chief To NDTV
content: Vijay's TVK looks set for a surprise electoral show in Tamil Nadu, leading in more than 100 seats after several rounds of counting of votes.

title: Kerala Election Results 2026 Live Updates: Congress-Led UDF Crosses Halfway Mark, Wins 11 Seats, BJP Leads In 2
content: Kerala Assembly Election Results 2026 LIVE Updates: The outcome is significant for all three alliances as they look to strengthen their presence in the state's changing political landscape.

title: "Keep This Video": Prashant Kishor's Vijay Victory Prediction From 2025 Viral
content: Asked whether the TVK coild win, Kishor had said, "Yes, absolutely. Keep this video and play it when the results come out in Tamil Nadu."

title: How Congress Engineered Its Comeback In Kerala
content: In Kerala, the Pinarayi Vijayan administration was buckling under the weight of incumbency. All the Congress had to do was avoid any blunders.

title: Sex Racket Busted During Raid At Arunachal Resort, 4 Women Rescued
content: A sex racket has been busted during a raid at a resort, and four women were rescued in Roing in Arunachal Pradesh's Lower Dibang Valley district, an official said on Monday.

title: India-Jamaica Ties Characterised By "Continuity And Change": S Jaishankar
content: On Saturday, S Jaishankar arrived in Jamaica on his first visit to the Caribbean nation to boost bilateral relations between the two countries.

title: "Hindu Vote Consolidated, Got Adivasi Vote Too": Suvendu Adhikari To NDTV As BJP Leads In Bengal
content: West Bengal Election Results: As the BJP maintained a strong lead in West Bengal, its state leader and possible Chief Ministerial candidate Suvendu Adhikari told NDTV that the party saw a consolidation of both Hindu and Adivasi votes.

title: India Sees Red: Left May Be Left With No Government In The Country
content: When the first elections were held in the country in 1951-52, it was the Communist Party of India that had the highest number of seats among Opposition parties in the Lok Sabha.

title: Markets News LIVE: Nifty, Sensex Turn Flat After Early Gains, Airtel And Infosys Top Losers
content: Stock Market, Share Market, Sensex, Nifty Live Updates: Markets are expected to react to the results of assembly elections in four states and one union territory, even as exit polls from key state elections point to a largely stable political landsca

title: Will Suvendu Adhikari Celebrate With Jhalmuri Or Fish? What He Told NDTV
content: Suvendu Adhikari and Mamata Banerjee went back-and-forth Monday in the race for the Bhabanipur constituency.

title: The 5 Ms Behind PM Modi-Led BJP's Rise In Mamata Banerjee's Bengal
content: With counting underway for the West Bengal Assembly elections 2026, early trends showed the BJP maintaining a comfortable lead with over 160 seats, well past the halfway mark of 148.

title: Why BJP Fought So Hard For Bengal: A Clue In Kolkata's Arterial Road
content: Syama Prasad Mookerjee is the reason the BJP says it fought so hard for Bengal. The party considers him a founding father.

title: Vijay’s TVK party emerges as formidable force in Tamil Nadu; all you need to know about its journey
content: vijay's party, Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), is emerging as a formidable force in Tamil Nadu . trends suggest a dramatic rise for the debutant outfit, challenging established players like DMK and AIDMK in the state .
